Aruba.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Dutch Caribbean, Netherlands COL as reference

Barbade.budget_override_reason: Premium Caribbean island; no Numbeo direct data; tourist market comparable to Bahamas/Cayman Islands

Gabon.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Central Africa, oil economy

Japon.budget_override_reason: Tourist hotel prices significantly exceed local COL; Tokyo Numbeo city index=73

Laos.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Southeast Asia low-income (Cambodia 34, Vietnam 26)

Maldives.budget_override_reason: Resort-only destination; no Numbeo data; structural luxury pricing

Monaco.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: France COL × 1.4 — ultra-premium enclave

Palaos.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Pacific island, no Numbeo data

Polynésie française.budget_override_reason: Remote Pacific; structural island premium; proxy France COL underestimates

Portugal.budget_override_reason: COL=48.8 borderline; budget/mid-range tourism market comparable to Spain

Qatar.budget_override_reason: Numbeo reflects expat residential costs; tourist hotel rates are high-end

Seychelles.budget_override_reason: Island resort destination; tourist accommodation prices significantly above local COL=64.5; comparable to Mauritius premium market
